changes.value:
swissarmyhammer-entity/src/context.rs

Coverage: 56.8% (386/679 lines)

Uncovered functions (largest gaps):
- undo / undo_single / undo_transaction / undo_update / undo_create / undo_delete (lines 492-765)
- redo / redo_single / redo_transaction / redo_update / redo_create / redo_delete (lines 982-1256)
- undo_archive / undo_unarchive / redo_archive / redo_unarchive (lines 782-959)
- archive / unarchive / list_archived / read_archived (lines 1326-1493)
- write / delete (lines 316-467)

What to test: Create a temp EntityContext, perform write/delete/archive operations, then verify undo and redo restore previous state correctly. Test transaction grouping, archive round-trips, and changelog entries.
Add tests for EntityContext undo/redo cycle
